{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023_10_05",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes a well-supported reframing.",
    "R1.2": "Walks through the argument chain, flags inconsistencies, and offers repairs.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one minor drift.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids harm and identifies harmful patterns in original content.",
    "RX.5": "Traces major rewrites but not minor edits."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.75,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes a well-supported reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Walks through the argument chain, flags inconsistencies, and offers repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one minor drift.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids harm and identifies harmful patterns in original content.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not minor edits.
